created.description: The timestamp of the MonetaryAccountSavings's creation.

updated.description: The timestamp of the MonetaryAccountSavings's last update.

currency.description: The currency of the MonetaryAccountSavings as an ISO 4217 formatted currency code.

description.description: The description of the MonetaryAccountSavings. Defaults to 'bunq account'.

daily_limit.description: The daily spending limit Amount of the MonetaryAccountSavings. Defaults to 1000 EUR. Currency must match the MonetaryAccountSavings's currency. Limited to 10000 EUR.

balance.description: The current available balance Amount of the MonetaryAccountSavings.

status.description: The status of the MonetaryAccountSavings. Can be: ACTIVE, BLOCKED, CANCELLED or PENDING_REOPEN

sub_status.description: The sub-status of the MonetaryAccountSavings providing extra information regarding the status. Will be NONE for ACTIVE or PENDING_REOPEN, COMPLETELY or ONLY_ACCEPTING_INCOMING for BLOCKED and REDEMPTION_INVOLUNTARY, REDEMPTION_VOLUNTARY or PERMANENT for CANCELLED.

reason.description: The reason for voluntarily cancelling (closing) the MonetaryAccountSavings, can only be OTHER.

reason_description.description: The optional free-form reason for voluntarily cancelling (closing) the MonetaryAccountSavings. Can be any user provided message.

all_co_owner.description: The users the account will be joint with.

user_id.description: The id of the User who owns the MonetaryAccountSavings.

savings_goal.description: The Savings Goal set for this MonetaryAccountSavings.

savings_goal_progress.description: The progress in percentages for the Savings Goal set for this MonetaryAccountSavings.

number_of_payment_remaining.description: The number of payments that can be made from this savings account
